title: Measuring Recommendation Impact Beyond Clicks (Netflix-style completion, delay, long-term satisfaction)
short_description: Design a Netflix-style recommendation system that optimizes for completion, delay, and long-term satisfaction—not just CTR—using multi-metric testing and sequential experiments.

title: Skip Rate Is Not a Failure Metric (Spotify-style discovery quality)
short_description: Reframe skips on Spotify-style products as exploration signals, and build metrics that separate healthy discovery from true rejection so you don’t turn off what’s actually working.

title: ETA Accuracy vs Speed in Quick Commerce (Uber-style last-mile SLAs)
short_description: Model Uber/Instamart-style delivery networks where trustworthy ETAs, routing cost, and operational chaos collide—and show when being predictably ‘on time’ beats being randomly fast.

title: Fraud Precision vs Customer Friction (Fintech rules+ML with guardrails)
short_description: Architect a tiered fraud engine for banks/fintech that layers rules and ML, cuts genuine fraud, and still lets good customers pay without endless OTPs, declines, and manual reviews.

title: Credit Decisions as Profit Systems (BFSI PD×LGD×EAD, reject inference)
short_description: Turn credit underwriting into a profit-and-governance system: PD×LGD×EAD, reject inference, fairness constraints, and policy guardrails that a risk committee would actually approve.

title: Marketplace Liquidity & Matching Analytics (Airbnb/Uber-style balancing)
short_description: Instrument an Uber/Airbnb-style marketplace with liquidity and matching metrics that expose cold starts, side-imbalances, and the exact point where more spend stops improving fills.

title: Dynamic Pricing Without Black Boxes (transparent elasticity, fairness constraints)
short_description: Design a surge/dynamic pricing engine that leaders can defend: interpretable elasticity, hard fairness constraints, and knobs for product and policy—not a mysterious demand curve.

title: Ad Auctions & Attribution Analytics (quality score, bids, incrementality)
short_description: Build a Google/Meta-style auction + attribution stack that balances bids, quality score, pacing, and lift so revenue goes up without turning your product into an ad spam machine.

title: North Star Metrics That Break at Scale (product operating model)
short_description: Show how beloved North Star metrics quietly break at scale, how teams game them, and how to replace them with a multi-metric operating system that survives real-world incentives.

title: Sequential A/B Testing in Real Products (Netflix-style sequential testing)
short_description: Turn experimentation into a streaming, always-on decision system using sequential testing, guardrails, and power-aware stopping rules that won’t get you fired by a statistician.

title: From Dashboards to Decision Systems (alerting, automation, ownership)
short_description: Refactor BI from pretty charts into decision systems: alerting, automation, and hard ownership so every critical metric has a human, a playbook, and a time-to-action SLA.

title: Why Analytics Teams Fail to Drive Impact (operating model, incentives, ownership)
short_description: Dissect why analytics teams stay ‘report factories’—org design, incentives, tooling—and sketch the operating model that turns your team into a decision and revenue engine.

title: Funnel Metrics vs Causal Product Understanding
short_description: Why funnels hide causality—funnel illusions, causal alternatives, and confounding effects.

title: Metric Gaming & Goodhart's Law
short_description: How metrics distort behavior—Goodhart's Law, gaming patterns, and guardrails.

title: Measuring Long-Term Value in Subscriptions
short_description: Moving beyond short-term retention—LTV realism, cohort decay, and delayed impact.

title: Event Taxonomy Design for Product Analytics
short_description: Designing analytics-friendly event schemas—event naming, cardinality issues, and schema drift.

title: Analytics Engineering with Data Contracts
short_description: Preventing silent data failures—data contracts, SLA for analytics, and versioning.

title: BI Dashboards as Decision Interfaces
short_description: Design dashboards that drive action—KPI layering, narrative dashboards, exec vs ops views.

title: Observability for Analytics Pipelines
short_description: Monitor data like production systems—data freshness, volume anomalies, trust metrics.

title: Warehouse-First Analytics vs Reverse ETL
short_description: Study decision latency trade-offs—centralized vs operational analytics, data freshness needs.

title: LLMs as Analyst Copilots
short_description: Use GenAI to accelerate analytics work—SQL generation, RCA assistance, insight summarization.

title: Human-in-the-Loop AI for Risk & Ops
short_description: Design safe AI systems with oversight—decision escalation, explainability, ops throughput.

title: Prompt-Driven Analytics vs SQL-First
short_description: Compare reliability of LLM queries vs SQL—hallucination risk, validation layers, hybrid workflows.

title: Churn as a Lagging Indicator (early signals, interventions)
short_description: Detect churn risk earlier—early signals, behavioral markers, and intervention analytics.

title: Retention vs Growth Trade-offs (cohort payback, blended CAC/LTV)
short_description: Balance acquisition and retention using cohort economics and payback periods.

title: AI Governance for Analytics Teams (risk, bias, accountability)
short_description: Bias monitoring, model accountability, and regulatory readiness.
